items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 再次就 6 月 12 日美国政府出口管制指令发布声明，要求暂停对 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的全部访问。Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 是 Anthropic 旗下受出口管制约束的模型（区别于公开发售的 Claude 系列），所有调用方需立即停用以避免合规风险。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：检查生产环境中是否存在 model id 含 fable-5 / mythos-5 的调用（包括 Bedrock / Vertex AI 上的托管版本），立即下线或替换为 claude-sonnet-5 / claude-opus-4.8；同时审计是否存在未清理的旧调用记录与缓存，规避出口合规风险。

items.title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most of
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. Announcements  ten use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Product  Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our inst...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Science 科学家工作台，整合研究常用工具与包，可生成可审计 artifact 并灵活调用算力。这是面向科研场景的垂直应用，非通用 API 升级；普通 AI 应用开发者不直接受益。
items.backend_focus: 无（如团队非科研场景）。Claude Science 是面向科学家的端到端工作台产品，不是 API/SDK 更新；只有做科研 agent 的团队需关注，普通 AI 工程团队无需行动。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. Announcements  Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Product   Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking proce...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Tag，作为团队与 Claude 协作的新方式。从命名与描述看属于产品/交互层功能（非底层 API）。是否引入新的 API 端点、webhook 或 SDK 钩子需以官方文档为准。
items.backend_focus: 关注官方文档：查看 Claude Tag 是否对应新的 API endpoint、webhook 事件或 SDK 方法（如 anthropic.messages 的 tag 字段），在产品 GA 与 SDK 同步更新后再评估是否在协作类工作流中接入；当前无需改动现有 Claude 调用代码。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. Announcements  Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Product  Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，作为 Opus 系列升级，在 coding、agentic 任务与专业工作负载上更强。Opus 是 Claude 高端档位，4.8 通常意味着更长 context window、更高 max_tokens 或更稳的 tool use 能力；定价高于 Sonnet，选用需评估成本。已用 Opus 4.x 的服务有升级窗口。
items.backend_focus: 评估升级：把 model id 为 claude-opus-4-* 的高价值流量（如复杂 coding/agent 任务）灰度切到 claude-opus-4-8；注意 Opus 4.8 定价高于 Sonnet，关注 input/output 单价与 prompt caching 折扣变化；同步核对 tool use、context window 是否需要客户端侧适配。

items.title: Redeploying Fable 5
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布《Redeploying Fable 5》一文，标题暗示在 6 月 12 日出口管制暂停后重新部署 Fable 5。属于受管制模型的可访问性变动，与第 11 条形成「暂停—恢复」闭环。需以官方公告确认恢复区域、可用 tier 与 API 端点变化。
items.backend_focus: 关注恢复范围：阅读原文确认 Fable 5 重新部署是否仅限特定 region（如美国境内）、是否对应 Bedrock/Vertex AI 上托管版本的 model id 变更、是否存在新的合规字段要求；在官方未明确前不要自动恢复调用，先以 Sonnet 5 / Opus 4.8 作为兜底。
